title: ADK-104: Tool Schema Design & Basic APIs
author: Google Cloud
description: Design robust agent tool definitions using strict parameter schemas and type reflections to wrap weather and currency APIs.

features.title: JSON Schema Design
features.description: Construct declarative type schemas for custom parameters that the LLM consumes for tool selection.

features.title: Pydantic Typing
features.description: Use Pydantic models to assert validation bounds on inputs, catching parameter typos immediately.

features.title: API Integrations
features.description: Configure external request boundaries, managing HTTP status codes and payloads safely.
